title: Upload Updated Penetration Test Report for Salesforce Certification
description:
After completing the penetration testing remediation cycle, the updated penetration test report was compiled and uploaded to partners.salesforce.com as part of the Salesforce AppExchange certification process.

## Deliverable

Updated penetration test report uploaded to the Salesforce partner portal.
acceptance_criteria: Updated penetration test report is uploaded to partners.salesforce.com
Report reflects all remediated vulnerabilities from the pen test cycle
Upload is accessible to Salesforce certification reviewers
implementation_notes: Administrative task — no code changes. Compiled remediation evidence and uploaded to Salesforce partner portal for certification review.
